concept: Create a platformer where you play as an amateur ghost hunter who can only interact with spirits by photographing them with different vintage cameras. Each camera lens reveals different spectral planes and paranormal phenomena that reconfigure the environment. The reluctant ghosts aren't malevolent—they're stuck in bureaucratic limbo and need properly documented evidence to process their afterlife paperwork. Navigate the crumbling mansion while helping spirits resolve their unfinished business through perfectly timed photographic evidence.
